title: ⚡ Frictionless Economy & Ultra-Smooth Layouts! 🚂
message: Welcome to Version 1.5.0! We have completely slashed pricing tiers globally to match your regional purchasing power, while overhauling the graphics engine for a butter-smooth tycoon experience!
points: 🎫 Massive Price Slashing: Complete structural drop across all 24-Hour, 7-Day, and 30-Day passes.
🚀 GPU Performance Overhaul: Full rendering isolation layers added to crowd simulation and train shunting paths. Fixes viewport scrolling lag completely for high-end cinematic smoothness.
📊 Micro-Batch Balance Refinement: Restructured vault rewards collection pipelines into tighter, hyper-accurate 2,000-point batches to optimize claims processing speeds.
⚙️ Concurrency & Clock Sync: Patched background time-delta accumulators and infrastructure traffic slots to ensure perfectly continuous station scheduling without delay hitches.

title: ⚡ Real-Time Upgrades & Cheaper Expansion! 🏗️
message: Welcome to Version 1.4.0! We've made expanding your railway empire smoother and much more affordable. Experience seamless real-time upgrades and faster station growth!
points: 🏗️ Cheaper Platforms: Significantly reduced the cost of purchasing new tracks and island platforms to help you expand faster.
🔄 Instant Synchronization: Complete overhaul of the connection between Upgrade Hubs and the Main Station. Your upgrades now apply instantly in real-time!
💰 Vault & Economy Fixes: Patched vault coin logic to ensure every passenger and freight reward is perfectly collected and saved.
✨ Performance Boosts: Optimized train rendering and background systems for a butter-smooth tycoon experience.

title: 🚀 Terminal Expansion & Economy Rebalancing! 🛠️
message: We’ve synchronized the rails and stabilized the station economy! This major update brings full persistence to all upgrade systems, ensuring your hard-earned progress is always locked to your local terminal, plus a brand new connectivity hub to manage city-wide transit links.
points: 🛠️ Economy Sync Fix: Overhauled upgrade and purchase logic to ensure your point wallet stay in perfect sync across all sectors.
🚆 Terminal Connectivity: Added full support for Metro Line and Roadway expansion systems, featuring custom procedural blueprints.
⏱️ Timetable Stabilization: Optimized scheduling logic, providing smoother platform allocations and precision train departures.

title: 🔊 Sound Correction & Performance Engine Optimization! ⚡
message: We have cleared the junction lines and tuned the command decks! This update stabilizes the audio pipeline focus and optimizes crowd rendering layers for an ultra-smooth station operations cycle.
points: 🔊 Balanced Audio Mix: Fixed sound channel drops by mixing background soundtracks cleanly alongside upgrade actions.
⚡ GPU Crowd Isolation: Optimized busy plaza platforms with layout repaint boundaries to eliminate frame lag.
🔒 Secure Time Frameworks: Implemented an unalterable local quota countdown system to keep ad-free pass boundaries safe.

title: ✨ Live Update Hub Connected! 🚀
message: We have added a brand new system notice window to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest station features and improvements.
points: 📡 New In-App Notifications: Get notified immediately about new app versions right from your main station screen.
📖 Easy-to-Read Changelogs: Discover exactly what is new in the latest patch list whenever an update drops.
🔄 Manual Update Check: Tap the new network button anytime to instantly check if your app is on the current version.
